title: The Navy Closes In
description: On pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part focuses on vivi speaks to her country. Vivi stands before Alabasta and chooses her duty as princess, even as her heart remains tied to the friends who saved her.
scene: This scene belongs to the Vivi Speaks to Her Country sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Narrator, Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rain poured down on Alabasta,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I simply wish to keep on watching,

summary: Vivi stands before Alabasta and chooses her duty as princess, even as her heart remains tied to the friends who saved her.
